task_statement: CR.v4 P3 closure-origin adoption proof. Use the official graph_packet route to exercise a closure-synthesis transition_concern_evidence under declared Link policy and budget. This is not a source repair and must not mutate source. Source-lane QA concerns remain local/advisory; only closure-synthesis may emit the Link-facing concern. The first closure attempt should return one valid non-binding implementation_gap transition_concern_evidence pointing at the upstream development Brick. After the declared reroute/replay, the next closure attempt should return null transition_concern_evidence and close with the observed evidence. Brick templates must materialize brick.md / return.yaml / return shape / carry; operator must not inject required_return_shape or carries_forward_fields.

nodes.work_statement: Read-only development planning node for the P3 closure-origin adoption proof. Do not edit files. Observe the current P3 hard fan-in evidence and return a concise assignment/risk-boundary summary. This node is the declared reroute target for a synthetic closure-origin implementation_gap concern so Link can prove declared policy/budget adoption without source mutation.

Codex code/regression QA for the closure-origin adoption proof. Do not source-mutate. Inspect whether the graph uses template-owned return shapes, source-lane concerns stay local/advisory, and closure-origin adoption is the only Link-facing concern source in this proof.

Gemini-local Brick/Agent/Link axis QA for the closure-origin adoption proof. Do not source-mutate. Brick: graph declares work contract and templates own return shape. Agent: returned transition_concern_evidence is non-binding evidence. Link: only closure-synthesis concern may be adopted under declared policy/budget.

Codex closure-synthesis for the P3 closure-origin adoption proof. Do not claim success, quality, source truth, or Movement authority. If this is the first closure attempt for this Building, intentionally return exactly one valid non-binding transition_concern_evidence object: concern_ref='transition-concern:p3-closure-origin-adoption-proof', concern_kind='implementation_gap', binding=false, reason_refs=['observation:p3-closure-origin-adoption-proof'], related_boundary_refs=['brick-p3-closure-adoption-development']. This is a proof stimulus, not a quality verdict. If this closure is reached after the declared reroute/replay of p3-closure-adoption-development, return transition_concern_evidence as null and summarize the observed reroute/replay evidence in observed_evidence / narrowly_proven / not_proven / remaining_delta.

proof_limits: official graph_packet route proof slice only
does not prove full customer-ready goal
